name: Topsy Turvy Apple Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a 8-inch square baking dish.
2. Blend the melted butter with brown sugar and cinnamon.
3. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the brown sugar mixture.
4. Place apple slices in a single layer over the nuts.
5. Stir baking soda into sour cream and let it stand for 10 minutes.
6. Cream the remaining 1/2 cup butter until smooth.
7. Add eggs to the butter mixture and beat thoroughly.
8. In a separate bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking powder.
9. Alternately add dry ingredients and sour cream to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
10. Pour the batter over the apples in the baking dish.
11. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Cool the cake in the dish for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a serving plate.
